title: Silly Moves: Tester
description: Tester versions from Silly Moves get released here, take a early look on new animations for your character!
body:
# A Experimental Minecraft Experience

Step into the lab of animation madness with **Silly Moves: Tester**, an experimental version of Silly Moves made for testing and feedback. This project lets you preview new and in-development animations before they officially release, giving you an exclusive look at the next generation of character motion in Minecraft.

With its signature smooth and silly style, Silly Moves Tester is designed for creators, testers, and curious players who want to help shape future updates, from expressive animations to experimental systems and more :P

**Coming Soon**

Be prepared for frequent updates! We’re testing facial expression improvements, smoother transitions, and exclusive animations made for Hold My Items 5.0 integration.

**Want to help us test or see sneak peeks?**

Join our Discord server to get involved and share your feedback!

**Requirements**

To use Silly Moves: Tester, you’ll need:

- Latest Entity Model Features (EMF) and Entity Texture Features (ETF) mods
- Minecraft 1.21.2 or higher
- Patience, since this is a test build, expect bugs!

**Credits**

**Our Silly Public:** Everyone that is testing to give us a feedback is making it all possible.
